sentences.sentence_en: Oh, wow, look. It’s cheaper here than at home.
sentences.sentence_vi: Ồ, nhìn này. Ở đây rẻ hơn ở nhà.
sentences.sentence_ipa: /oʊ waʊ lʊk ɪts ˈʧipər hɪr ðæn æt hoʊm/
accepted_answers: oh wow look its cheaper here than at home
oh wow look it is cheaper here than at home

sentences.sentence_en: I don’t know. After you calculate the exchange rate, it may not be so cheap.
sentences.sentence_vi: Tôi không biết. Sau khi tính tỷ giá, có thể không rẻ như vậy đâu.
sentences.sentence_ipa: /aɪ doʊnt noʊ ˈæftər ju ˈkælkjəˌleɪt ði ɪksˈʧeɪndʒ reɪt ɪt meɪ nɑt bi soʊ ʧip/
accepted_answers: i dont know after you calculate the exchange rate it may not be so cheap
i do not know after you calculate the exchange rate it may not be so cheap

sentences.sentence_en: Really? Ah, yeah. I guess you’re right.
sentences.sentence_vi: Thật à? À, đúng rồi. Tôi đoán bạn đúng.

accepted_answers: really yeah i guess youre right

sentences.sentence_vi: Ồ, này, ngửi thử cái này đi.

sentences.sentence_en: That’s really nice. Is that for Rachel? We really should get her something special.
sentences.sentence_vi: Thơm thật đấy. Cái này cho Rachel à? Chúng ta nên mua cho cô ấy thứ gì đó đặc biệt.

accepted_answers: thats really nice is that for rachel we really should get her something special
that is really nice is that for rachel we really should get her something special

sentences.sentence_en: Yeah, she’ll like this, I’m sure. The bottle is pretty, too. Excuse me.
sentences.sentence_vi: Ừ, cô ấy sẽ thích cái này, tôi chắc chắn. Cái chai cũng đẹp nữa. Xin lỗi.

sentences.sentence_vi: Chúng tôi muốn mua cái này.

sentences.sentence_en: OK. May I see your boarding pass, please?
